reason: The image depicts a scene reminiscent of the Great Plague of London. Cobblestone streets, stone buildings, simple clothing and candlelight are all consistent with the period. No overt anachronisms or fantastical elements are immediately visible. The overall dark and somber tone effectively conveys the despair associated with the plague. However, the quality of the window glass and the degree of illumination from a single candle are areas where more historical accuracy could be desired. The building construction style is somewhat generic and difficult to precisely date, but doesn't appear drastically out of place.
